basics.name: Acevedo Miguel
basics.label: Cloud Architect & DevOps Engineer
basics.summary: Cloud Architect and DevOps Engineer with 20+ years of experience designing serverless, high-availability infrastructure across APAC. Proven track record leading distributed technical teams and delivering IoT solutions for the Japan energy market. Deep expertise in AWS serverless architectures (Lambda, EKS), Kubernetes, and AWS IoT Core. Based in Hong Kong (GMT+8) with extensive experience collaborating with teams across Singapore, Australia, and Japan. Fluent in English and Spanish; conversational Japanese (JLPT N5).

work.name: Tensor Energy
highlights: Architected the next-generation energy platform for the Japan market, defining the serverless base architecture and tech stack
Led distributed technical teams across APAC, establishing development and deployment best practices
Built serverless backend services in TypeScript (GraphQL) and Go (Lambda), leveraging Aurora Postgres, Step Functions, ECS, and Batch
Delivered infrastructure cost optimization through AWS serverless and EKS architectures
Managed infrastructure-as-code with AWS CDK

work.name: Henderson (China) Investment Company Limited
highlights: Architected high-availability systems for China and Hong Kong, driving performance optimization and cost-efficient library selection
Designed streaming microservice architecture for IoT integration, including AWS IoT Core device provisioning and management
Owned CI/CD strategy and DevOps best practices, reducing deployment risk across mainland China and Hong Kong
Integrated IoT hardware with 3rd-party providers, supporting large-scale device fleets
Deployed and managed Kubernetes platforms on AWS (EKS and bare-metal EC2)
Maintained observability stack (Grafana, Kibana, Elasticsearch, Filebeat), storage (Redis, Postgres, Cassandra), and messaging (Kafka, MQTT)

work.name: Cereb Intelligence
highlights: Cut deployment cycles by ~40% and eliminated recurring build errors by migrating to Docker-based build and release processes
Planned scalable, high-availability infrastructure on AWS EKS, Kafka, and Node.js
Authored and maintained backend services integrating 3rd-party APIs (Lifesmart, Softhard.io, Salto Access, SMS gateway, Dingtalk, Telegram Bot, Slack Bot)
Enhanced infrastructure observability through monitoring and reporting dashboards
Reduced CI/CD spend and improved pipeline speed by migrating from Bitbucket Pipelines to self-hosted Jenkins
Provided remote support for 1000+ connected devices across APAC

work.name: Urban Spring
highlights: IoT Specialist — defined MQTT data specifications and DB schema for connected device fleet
Built Python-based automation for AWS IoT Core device provisioning (Things, Certificates, Policies, Shadow)
Deployed infrastructure-as-code with Terraform and Kubernetes on AWS
Mentored junior developers in a distributed team environment
Performed firmware code review (C/C++) for STM32 from 3rd-party vendors

work.name: LYNK
highlights: Led and mentored junior and new developers in a distributed team setting
Implemented Scrum to improve team output, managing developers and resources while establishing good software practices
Modified current systems, writing and testing code
Designed and created optimised web applications in HTML5, CSS and WebRTC to support company' s business needs which includes a Skype-like application for experts and clients consultations
Worked independently and as team in collaboration with other departments in establishing their needs for their business goals
Contributing to overall business development with regular meetings with management, and aligning goals with the CTO and CEO

work.name: Kaizen Interactive
highlights: Created an original Social CRM platform which serves as an interface for clients' applications usage, users demographics and reporting

Managed all stages of promotional applications' creations for clients, from initial design and architecture to development, deployment, and management. Completed a total of 40 projects, serving more than 200.000 users online
Worked directly with clients in different countries, Argentina, Mexico, Chile, Spain and France
Helped create and implement new ideas for ways to grow the business and generate revenue
Managed project tasks, timelines, and communication with several freelance developers and designers
Demonstrated the ability to work diligently under pressure to meet deadlines

work.name: Gravity Makers
highlights: Trained in Symbian and Qt
Designed for and tested mobile applications, across multiple devices
Successfully adapted and thrived in a fast-paced work environment with rapidly changing goals

work.name: United Virtualities
highlights: Successfully served as lead project manager of three developers
Responsible for overall web project management from development to execution and maintenance

work.name: E-volution
highlights: Trained and supervised multiple team members for new arrival technology
Worked with the program managers on designing site architecture, user interfaces, and the overall look and feel of the applications
Created "The bubble machine" game which won a "Diente de Oro 2005" for innovation being a game playable with the webcam
Develop and localise several online games mainly for Disney Latin America
Created interactivity using Flash, ActionScript, and JavaScript

work.name: Marketing Plus
highlights: Develop a horse racing game simulator using real data, integrating the game with the internal system of the racing course in Buenos Aires
Created Dynamic Websites that were user-friendly, effective, and appealing for more than 12 clients
Managed several web servers in production and development

work.name: Gauchito
highlights: Acquired an in-depth familiarisation with CNC and electronics
Create custom web based UI applications for products and stock management, based on department needs and functionality
Setup the e-commerce and online quotation system
